title: Mergers: how they are investigated
body: "This page explains how mergers between businesses are investigated by the CMA.  It’s a simple guide for businesses to help you understand:    our role in merger control    what counts as a merger   legal criteria for investigating a merger   how we find out about mergers   how we assess a merger   how our investigations work, including how long it takes and what you need to do, and what the possible outcomes are    For more detailed information about our remit and processes, read our guidance on the CMA’s jurisdiction and procedure (CMA2).  If you need something else, go to Merging your business. "
